title: DTU Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: Delhi Technological University (DTU) Guest Faculty (Yoga & Wellness) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of DTU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DTU Guest Faculty (Yoga & Wellness) Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) Guest Faculty (Yoga & Wellness) Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of DTU. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DTU Guest Faculty (Yoga & Wellness) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.A. In Yoga from any recognized university of India
qualification.details: M.A. In Yoga from any recognized university of India.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the DTU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Delhi Technological University recruitment is Guest Faculty (Yoga & Wellness).

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the Guest Faculty (Yoga & Wellness) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 04 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is M.A. In Yoga from any recognized university of India.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the DTU located?
faq.answer: Delhi Technological University is located in Delhi, with a pincode of 110042.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is DTU/Dean-OEA/Yoga Certificate/24/81.
